{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Collaboration Presales Engineer",
  "description": "IT Horizons Limited is a company with diverse talents and skills in existing, recent, and upcoming technologies worldwide. We are a team of young, vibrant, ambitious, but experienced professionals who deal with everything relating to technologies, especially information and communication technologies (ICT). In addition, we have the ability to update with the latest trends and requirements of our esteemed clients. Our company, established in 2010, has been driven by innovations and excellence, and with its rapid rate of success and customers&rsquo; requirements, we were fully incorporated into a private limited company in 2012 with the aim of helping organizations in achieving their goals by providing optimum technological solutions while reducing the total cost of ownership.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Collaboration Presales Engineer

Job Location: Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	The Collaboration Presales Engineer shall be responsible for all Presales activities involving solutions around Collaboration (Solution Architecting and Technology Sales) deliverables in the company.
	He is to coordinate his activities and ensure bids and solutions inquiries are attended to within the time committed to meeting customer business outcomes at the best possible price.
	He ensures the submission to the bid desk/Sales account managers/executives is of high quality and positions ITH for a win against its competition.
	The technology focus is on collaboration, and any technology solutions the company takes up at any time.
	He constantly advises the business on evolving technologies based on market trends and customer requests.
	He is responsible for driving OEM/vendor/Distributor engagement to ensure ITH is at the appropriate partnership level supporting her Business with customers. He is responsible for his financial target.


Responsibilities


	Participate and oversee all the unit&rsquo;s Presales activities (Solution Architecting and Technology Sales on Collaboration).
	Participate and ensure the proper and cost-effective solution is always proposed to the customer.
	Directs the team to support sales in achieving the company&#39;s technology financial targets.
	Manages relationships and partnerships with OEMs, vendors, and Distributors.
	Plan and deliver technology workshops to customers to generate business opportunities.
	Constantly provide leadership and develop the team per market needs for technology delivery and global technology trends.
	Provides technical support for the Sales and Implementation in the review of new business.
	Builds relationships with customers and global partners, especially with the Team Lead, Collaboration, resulting in superior solutions and deeper loyalty and adoption of ITH&rsquo;s solutions.
	Perform other duties that the organization may assign.
	Provides in-depth knowledge and expertise on pre-sales and technical activities/ engagement.
	Provide the Team Lead, collaborate with reports, measure business performance through data and metrics analysis, and develop ways to improve processes.
	Oversee all research and development in line with the company&#39;s strategic plan and technology activities for enhancing existing and developing new products/services and advising on the technical roadmap.
	Assess the business risks of new technical, commercial, and partnership opportunities.


Qualifications


	University Degree in Computer Science, Technology-related courses, Engineering, or other numerate disciplines
	A master&rsquo;s degree in business administration, Information Technology, or related fields from a recognized University will be an advantage.
	CCNP (Cisco Certified Network Professional),
	CCNP - Collaboration (Cisco Certified Network Professional - Security, ITIL, Sophos Certified Engineer.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@ithorizonsgroup.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Collaboration Presales Engineer Job at IT Horizons Limited




        
    

        
        IT Horizons Limited is a company with diverse talents and skills in existing, recent, and upcoming technologies worldwide. We are a team of young, vibrant, ambitious, but experienced professionals who deal with everything relating to technologies, especially information and communication technologies (ICT). In addition, we have the ability to update with the latest trends and requirements of our esteemed clients. Our company, established in 2010, has been driven by innovations and excellence, and with its rapid rate of success and customers’ requirements, we were fully incorporated into a private limited company in 2012 with the aim of helping organizations in achieving their goals by providing optimum technological solutions while reducing the total cost of ownership.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Collaboration Presales Engineer

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	The Collaboration Presales Engineer shall be responsible for all Presales activities involving solutions around Collaboration (Solution Architecting and Technology Sales) deliverables in the company.
	He is to coordinate his activities and ensure bids and solutions inquiries are attended to within the time committed to meeting customer business outcomes at the best possible price.
	He ensures the submission to the bid desk/Sales account managers/executives is of high quality and positions ITH for a win against its competition.
	The technology focus is on collaboration, and any technology solutions the company takes up at any time.
	He constantly advises the business on evolving technologies based on market trends and customer requests.
	He is responsible for driving OEM/vendor/Distributor engagement to ensure ITH is at the appropriate partnership level supporting her Business with customers. He is responsible for his financial target.


Responsibilities


	Participate and oversee all the unit’s Presales activities (Solution Architecting and Technology Sales on Collaboration).
	Participate and ensure the proper and cost-effective solution is always proposed to the customer.
	Directs the team to support sales in achieving the company's technology financial targets.
	Manages relationships and partnerships with OEMs, vendors, and Distributors.
	Plan and deliver technology workshops to customers to generate business opportunities.
	Constantly provide leadership and develop the team per market needs for technology delivery and global technology trends.
	Provides technical support for the Sales and Implementation in the review of new business.
	Builds relationships with customers and global partners, especially with the Team Lead, Collaboration, resulting in superior solutions and deeper loyalty and adoption of ITH’s solutions.
	Perform other duties that the organization may assign.
	Provides in-depth knowledge and expertise on pre-sales and technical activities/ engagement.
	Provide the Team Lead, collaborate with reports, measure business performance through data and metrics analysis, and develop ways to improve processes.
	Oversee all research and development in line with the company's strategic plan and technology activities for enhancing existing and developing new products/services and advising on the technical roadmap.
	Assess the business risks of new technical, commercial, and partnership opportunities.


Qualifications


	University Degree in Computer Science, Technology-related courses, Engineering, or other numerate disciplines
	A master’s degree in business administration, Information Technology, or related fields from a recognized University will be an advantage.
	CCNP (Cisco Certified Network Professional),
	CCNP - Collaboration (Cisco Certified Network Professional - Security, ITIL, Sophos Certified Engineer.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Experienced Real Estate Sales Manager (Luxury Properties)",
  "description": "Sylvastar Group is a diversified Nigerian conglomerate with its headquarters in Abuja, Nigeria, operating across multiple sectors, including real estate, agriculture, food &amp; beverages, finance, and petrochemical manufacturing.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Experienced Real Estate Sales Manager (Luxury Properties)

Job Location: Jabi, Wuse, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking an experienced and results-driven Real Estate Sales Manager to lead and oversee the sales operations of our luxury property portfolio.
	The ideal candidate will possess strong leadership skills, deep knowledge of the luxury real estate market, and a proven track record in driving revenue growth, managing high-performing sales teams, and closing premium property deals.
	The Sales Manager will be responsible for developing strategic sales initiatives, mentoring sales executives, building strong client relationships, and ensuring exceptional customer experience throughout the sales process.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead, supervise, and manage the luxury property sales team to achieve and exceed monthly and annual sales targets.
	Develop and implement effective sales strategies to drive revenue growth and market expansion.
	Identify and pursue high-net-worth clients, investors, and corporate prospects.
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis to identify trends and business opportunities within the luxury real estate sector.
	Train, mentor, and evaluate sales executives to improve productivity, professionalism, and performance.
	Monitor daily sales activities, lead generation, client follow-ups, and conversion rates.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, realtors, investors, and strategic partners.
	Coordinate property inspections, site tours, presentations, and negotiations with prospective clients.
	Ensure accurate documentation, contract processing, and compliance with company policies and real estate regulations.
	Prepare and present weekly and monthly sales performance reports to management.
	Collaborate with the marketing team to create promotional campaigns and luxury property branding strategies.
	Ensure excellent customer service and professional representation of the company at all times.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Estate Management, or related field.
	4&ndash;6 years of proven experience in real estate sales, with at least 2 years in a managerial role.
	Strong background in luxury property sales and high-value client management.
	Demonstrated ability to lead and motivate a sales team toward achieving targets.
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Strong understanding of the Abuja luxury real estate market and industry trends.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and CRM software.
	Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple priorities effectively.
	Professional appearance, confidence, and strong presentation skills.


Preferred Qualities:


	Strategic thinker with strong business development abilities.
	Highly organized and target-oriented.
	Strong networking and relationship management skills.
	Ability to close high-value deals and manage client expectations professionally.
	Self-motivated with a passion for luxury real estate and sales excellence.


Compensation &amp; Benefits


	Salary: N250,000 monthly.
	Attractive Salary Package
	High Commission &amp; Performance Incentives
	Career Growth Opportunities
	Professional Development &amp; Training
	Supportive and Competitive Work Environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Interested and qualified candidates should send their cover letter and CV/portfolio explaining their networking and connections for getting in touch with high-net-worth individuals to: hr@sylvastargroup.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Experienced Real Estate Sales Manager (Luxury Properties) Job at Sylvastar Group




        
    

        
        Sylvastar Group is a diversified Nigerian conglomerate with its headquarters in Abuja, Nigeria, operating across multiple sectors, including real estate, agriculture, food & beverages, finance, and petrochemical manufacturing.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Experienced Real Estate Sales Manager (Luxury Properties)

Job Location: Jabi, Wuse, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking an experienced and results-driven Real Estate Sales Manager to lead and oversee the sales operations of our luxury property portfolio.
	The ideal candidate will possess strong leadership skills, deep knowledge of the luxury real estate market, and a proven track record in driving revenue growth, managing high-performing sales teams, and closing premium property deals.
	The Sales Manager will be responsible for developing strategic sales initiatives, mentoring sales executives, building strong client relationships, and ensuring exceptional customer experience throughout the sales process.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead, supervise, and manage the luxury property sales team to achieve and exceed monthly and annual sales targets.
	Develop and implement effective sales strategies to drive revenue growth and market expansion.
	Identify and pursue high-net-worth clients, investors, and corporate prospects.
	Conduct market research and competitor analysis to identify trends and business opportunities within the luxury real estate sector.
	Train, mentor, and evaluate sales executives to improve productivity, professionalism, and performance.
	Monitor daily sales activities, lead generation, client follow-ups, and conversion rates.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, realtors, investors, and strategic partners.
	Coordinate property inspections, site tours, presentations, and negotiations with prospective clients.
	Ensure accurate documentation, contract processing, and compliance with company policies and real estate regulations.
	Prepare and present weekly and monthly sales performance reports to management.
	Collaborate with the marketing team to create promotional campaigns and luxury property branding strategies.
	Ensure excellent customer service and professional representation of the company at all times.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Estate Management, or related field.
	4–6 years of proven experience in real estate sales, with at least 2 years in a managerial role.
	Strong background in luxury property sales and high-value client management.
	Demonstrated ability to lead and motivate a sales team toward achieving targets.
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Strong understanding of the Abuja luxury real estate market and industry trends.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and CRM software.
	Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple priorities effectively.
	Professional appearance, confidence, and strong presentation skills.


Preferred Qualities:


	Strategic thinker with strong business development abilities.
	Highly organized and target-oriented.
	Strong networking and relationship management skills.
	Ability to close high-value deals and manage client expectations professionally.
	Self-motivated with a passion for luxury real estate and sales excellence.


Compensation & Benefits


	Salary: N250,000 monthly.
	Attractive Salary Package
	High Commission & Performance Incentives
	Career Growth Opportunities
	Professional Development & Training
	Supportive and Competitive Work Environment.


Method of Application 

Interested and qualified candidates should send their cover letter and CV/portfolio explaining their networking and connections for getting in touch with high-net-worth individuals to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Store Manager",
  "description": "Food4Less Grocery is a budget-friendly supermarket chain offering a wide selection of fresh produce, pantry staples, household essentials, and quality groceries at unbeatable prices. Committed to affordability and convenience, Food4Less provides customers with a no-frills shopping experience while maintaining high standards of quality and freshness. With multiple locations, the store caters to diverse communities, ensuring access to cost-effective grocery solutions for families and individuals alike.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Store Manager

Job Location: Ikirun, Osun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview


	We are seeking an experienced and highly organized Retail Branch Manager to oversee the daily operations of our retail mega store.
	The ideal candidate must have a strong background in retail management, excellent leadership abilities, and a proven track record of achieving sales targets, maintaining high operational standards, and leading a diverse team effectively.
	The Branch Manager will be responsible for ensuring smooth store operations, maximizing profitability, enhancing customer satisfaction, and ensuring compliance with company policies.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the overall operations of the retail branch, ensuring smooth daily activities.
	Supervise and coordinate the work of all department heads, supervisors, and floor staff.
	Develop and implement sales strategies to meet and exceed store revenue targets.
	Monitor stock levels and ensure effective inventory control and replenishment.
	Maintain high standards of merchandising, store layout, and product display.
	Analyze sales reports and key performance indicators (KPIs) to drive performance.
	Ensure compliance with company policies, health, and safety regulations.
	Handle customer complaints and resolve issues promptly to maintain satisfaction.
	Recruit, train, motivate, and evaluate staff performance to foster a productive team.
	Prepare and submit periodic reports on sales performance, staffing, and operations.
	Manage budgets, expenses, and ensure cost control across store operations.
	Drive customer engagement initiatives and promote brand loyalty.


Qualifications and Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or any related field.
	Minimum of 5 years of proven experience as a Branch Manager or Store Manager in a retail mega store (supermarket, electronics, or pharmacy chain).
	Strong leadership, organizational, and team management skills.
	Excellent knowledge of retail operations, merchandising, and customer service standards.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and POS/inventory management systems.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Must be goal-oriented, strategic, and able to make sound business decisions.
	Must reside within Osun state, Osogbo and its environs.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@food4lessgrocery.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Store Manager Job at Food4less Supermarket




        
    

        
        Food4Less Grocery is a budget-friendly supermarket chain offering a wide selection of fresh produce, pantry staples, household essentials, and quality groceries at unbeatable prices. Committed to affordability and convenience, Food4Less provides customers with a no-frills shopping experience while maintaining high standards of quality and freshness. With multiple locations, the store caters to diverse communities, ensuring access to cost-effective grocery solutions for families and individuals alike.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Store Manager

Job Location: Ikirun, Osun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking an experienced and highly organized Retail Branch Manager to oversee the daily operations of our retail mega store.
	The ideal candidate must have a strong background in retail management, excellent leadership abilities, and a proven track record of achieving sales targets, maintaining high operational standards, and leading a diverse team effectively.
	The Branch Manager will be responsible for ensuring smooth store operations, maximizing profitability, enhancing customer satisfaction, and ensuring compliance with company policies.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the overall operations of the retail branch, ensuring smooth daily activities.
	Supervise and coordinate the work of all department heads, supervisors, and floor staff.
	Develop and implement sales strategies to meet and exceed store revenue targets.
	Monitor stock levels and ensure effective inventory control and replenishment.
	Maintain high standards of merchandising, store layout, and product display.
	Analyze sales reports and key performance indicators (KPIs) to drive performance.
	Ensure compliance with company policies, health, and safety regulations.
	Handle customer complaints and resolve issues promptly to maintain satisfaction.
	Recruit, train, motivate, and evaluate staff performance to foster a productive team.
	Prepare and submit periodic reports on sales performance, staffing, and operations.
	Manage budgets, expenses, and ensure cost control across store operations.
	Drive customer engagement initiatives and promote brand loyalty.


Qualifications and Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or any related field.
	Minimum of 5 years of proven experience as a Branch Manager or Store Manager in a retail mega store (supermarket, electronics, or pharmacy chain).
	Strong leadership, organizational, and team management skills.
	Excellent knowledge of retail operations, merchandising, and customer service standards.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and POS/inventory management systems.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Must be goal-oriented, strategic, and able to make sound business decisions.
	Must reside within Osun state, Osogbo and its environs.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Sunrose Consulting Limited
content:
Sunrose Consulting Limited - Our clients in various sectors are recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the following positions below:

1.) Clearing Officer (Import / Export)

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Reporting to the Logistics Manager, you will play a crucial role in ensuring the efficient and accurate clearance of goods through customs.
	This position requires meticulous attention to detail, a thorough understanding of customs regulations, and the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously. You will liaise with customs officials, clients, and other stakeholders to facilitate the smooth and timely movement of goods, resolve any issues that may arise, and maintain compliance with all relevant laws and regulations.
	The role demands strong organisational skills, excellent, communication abilities, and a commitment to providing exceptional customer service.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare and submit customs documentation.
	Liaise with customs officials to ensure compliance with regulations.
	Track and monitor shipments to ensure timely clearance.
	Resolve any issues or discrepancies related to customs clearance.
	Maintain accurate records and files.


Qualifications & Experience


	A Bachelor’s Degree or its equivalent in any discipline.
	Minimum of 3 years of applied experience in clearing of customer documents is a requirement.
	Proficiency in Ms. Office packages: Excel, Word, Power point
	Additional education or certifications in Logistics or a related field are advantageous


Minimum Requirements & Skills:


	Excellent command of written and spoken English
	Must be familiar with Customs & Excise procedures (Classification, Import & Export requirements)
	Experience in customs clearing and forwarding
	Strong understanding of customs regulations
	Prepared to work irregular hours, weekends, and shifts
	Ability to work in a pressurised environment
	Attention to detail and high level of accuracy
	Excellent organisational skills
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Customer driven approach.


Application Closing Date: 12th June, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

2.) Customer Service Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	Reporting to the Operations Manager, you will be the first point of contact for the clients. You will be responsible for managing all client communication from intake to delivery, ensuring accuracy, professionalism, and timeliness.
	This role requires strong organisation, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple client requests while maintaining the brand's premium service standard.


Job Responsibilities
Client Communication & Intake:


	Manage all incoming client enquiries (WhatsApp, calls, walk-ins)
	Accurately capture client details and job information at intake
	Clearly communicate services, pricing, and timelines to clients
	Ensure all client expectations are properly set from the start


Job Coordination & Tracking:


	Log all jobs correctly into the system/spreadsheet
	Ensure jobs are properly assigned and tracked through each stage
	Follow up internally to ensure jobs are progressing as expected
	Keep clients updated on the status of their items when necessary


Customer Experience:


	Maintain a professional, warm, and consistent tone in all communication
	Ensure timely responses to all client enquiries
	Handle client concerns, complaints, or feedback calmly and effectively
	Escalate sensitive or complex issues to management when required


Delivery & Collections:


	Coordinate client pickups and deliveries
	Ensure items are ready and properly checked before client collection
	Communicate clearly with clients regarding collection timelines


Organisation & Record Keeping:


	Maintain accurate records of all client interactions and jobs
	Ensure before-and-after photos are properly documented
	Keep all client and job data organised and up to date


Requirements


	At least 2 years of experience in customer service or client-facing roles, preferably in luxury services or service-based businesses.
	Must be articulate and well-spoken, with the ability to communicate clearly and professionally at all times
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	Highly organised and detail-oriented
	Ability to multitask and manage multiple clients at once
	Calm and professional under pressure
	Comfortable using spreadsheets, WhatsApp, and basic tracking systems


Application Closing Date: 18th May, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their application letter and CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

3.) Litigation Clerk

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Reporting to the Practice Manager, you will provide support and administrative services to the legal team.
	You will complete paperwork, file documents in courts, communicate with clients, set appointments and meetings.
	In addition, you will enter all data and information, and maintain electronic copies as well as hard copies when necessary.
	This includes records of clients, production laws, meetings and more.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND qualified,
	you must have a minimum of 2 years of similar experience from a law firm.
	You must be very organised and detail-oriented and able to manage your time and juggle multiple tasks at once
	You must be an excellent communicator, both verbal and written.
	You must be highly professional and trustworthy. Proficiency in Microsoft Office is essential.


Application Closing Date: 24th May, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their application letter and CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

4.) Operations Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Reporting to the Founder, you will take full ownership of day-to-day operations across the workshop and front office, manage staff performance, ensure processes are followed, and maintain smooth business operations with minimal supervision.
	This role requires someone accountable, takes initiative and has good people management skills.


Job Responsibilities
Operations Management:


	Oversee daily workshop and office operations end-to-end
	Ensure jobs move efficiently from intake to completion and delivery
	Maintain and improve operational processes and workflows
	Track turnaround times and enforce deadlines
	Monitor inventory (materials, tools, products) and manage restocking


Team Management:


	Supervise artisans, customer service staff, and operations support staff
	Set clear daily and weekly targets and ensure accountability
	Monitor productivity and quality of work
	Address performance issues promptly and professionally
	Coordinate staff schedules, attendance, and task allocation


Reporting & Structure;


	Prepareweekly operational reports(jobs completed, pending, issues, stock levels)
	Maintain clear records and tracking systems (spreadsheets, logs, job trackers)
	Ensure SOPs are followed consistently


Customer & Service Oversight (Limited Direct Contact)


	Oversee customer service standards without excessive direct handling
	Step in only when escalation is required
	Ensure customer communications are professional, timely, and aligned with brand


Problem Solving & Ownership:


	Identify operational problems and resolve them independently
	Make practical decisions in the best interest of the business
	Reduce reliance on the Founder for routine issues


Requirements


	Minimum of 5 years of experience in luxury service or operations.
	Experience managing artisans, technical teams, or service-based businesses is an advantage
	Strong leadership and people management skills
	Highly organised, structured, and process-driven
	Able to work independently and take full ownership of responsibilities
	Excellent written and verbal communication
	Comfortable using spreadsheets, task trackers, and basic reporting tools.


Application Closing Date: 27th May, 2026. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Inventory Associate",
  "description": "ipNX is one of Nigeria&rsquo;s fastest growing Information and Communications Technology companies, serving a multitude of needs across enterprises, small businesses and residents with innovative, world-class services.

Our ability to identify, satisfy and exceed today&rsquo;s market needs is a testament to over a decade of experience, our commitment, drive and passion realized through highly skilled and well seasoned professionals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Associate
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	To provide support for all Inventory management activities in the region to all departments in order to achieve their operational targets.


Responsibilities


	Implement the company&rsquo;s policies and guidelines with regards to Inventory management process while supporting regional operations&rsquo; needs
	Ensure completeness in all deliveries to the region with real time documentation of same.
	Coordinate all daily requisitions from user departments following the guidelines in fulfilling the orders received through PARIC.
	Liaise with the Head for stock replenishment based on the material requirement plan for the region.
	Document all daily transactions, post same on SUN Application.
	Prepare weekly, monthly, quarterly and yearly Inventory management report.
	Perform cyclic stock checks and quarterly Stock count for proper stock accountability for the region.
	Coordinate the end of year stock count for the region.
	Prepare and send to Headquarter a list of faulty equipment for repair and liaise with Headquarter for directive on same, on a quarterly basis.


Qualifications/Experience


	B.Sc./HND in Social or Management Sciences or related fields.
	Minimum of 2 years in inventory Management.
	Documentation skills.
	Inventory Management skills.
	Professional Qualification in Supply Management (added advantage).
	Basic understanding of Inventory Management.


Salary
N105,000 per month.&nbsp;

Note: Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

Inventory Associate Job at ipNX Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        ipNX is one of Nigeria’s fastest growing Information and Communications Technology companies, serving a multitude of needs across enterprises, small businesses and residents with innovative, world-class services.

Our ability to identify, satisfy and exceed today’s market needs is a testament to over a decade of experience, our commitment, drive and passion realized through highly skilled and well seasoned professionals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Associate
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	To provide support for all Inventory management activities in the region to all departments in order to achieve their operational targets.


Responsibilities


	Implement the company’s policies and guidelines with regards to Inventory management process while supporting regional operations’ needs
	Ensure completeness in all deliveries to the region with real time documentation of same.
	Coordinate all daily requisitions from user departments following the guidelines in fulfilling the orders received through PARIC.
	Liaise with the Head for stock replenishment based on the material requirement plan for the region.
	Document all daily transactions, post same on SUN Application.
	Prepare weekly, monthly, quarterly and yearly Inventory management report.
	Perform cyclic stock checks and quarterly Stock count for proper stock accountability for the region.
	Coordinate the end of year stock count for the region.
	Prepare and send to Headquarter a list of faulty equipment for repair and liaise with Headquarter for directive on same, on a quarterly basis.


Qualifications/Experience


	B.Sc./HND in Social or Management Sciences or related fields.
	Minimum of 2 years in inventory Management.
	Documentation skills.
	Inventory Management skills.
	Professional Qualification in Supply Management (added advantage).
	Basic understanding of Inventory Management.


Salary
N105,000 per month. 

Note: Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
